articles.headline: World Cup Daily live: Haaland buys cowboy hat; USMNT, England in action
articles.description: We have three matches for you on Wednesday as more round-of-32 action at the 2026 World Cup continues.

articles.headline: Chancellor of Germany derided for praising 'team spirit' of national side after World Cup exit
articles.description: The Chancellor of Germany has been subject to derision online following a tweet in which he lauded his national team's "team spirit" in their World Cup elimination at the hands of Paraguay.

images.name: Friedrich Merz [1296x729]
images.caption: The Chancellor of Germany, Friedrich Merz, was subject to ridicule after praising Germany's "team spirit" on social media after their World Cup exit.
images.credit: Photo by Nicolas Economou/NurPhoto via Getty Images

images.name: Klinsmann: Germany's World Cup elimination is an embarrassment
images.caption: Klinsmann: Germany's World Cup elimination is an embarrassment

articles.headline: Germany's Manuel Neuer retires from international football, has 'no regrets' after World Cup exit
articles.description: Bayern Munich captain Manuel Neuer insists he has "no regrets" after announcing his decision to retire from international duty - for the second time in his career - following Germany's "very painful" World Cup exit.

images.name: Manuel Neuer [1296x729]
images.caption: Manuel Neuer said he has no regrets after calling time on his international career following Germany's World Cup exit.
images.credit: Photo by Harry Langer/DeFodi Images/DeFodi via Getty Images

images.name: Klinsmann: Germany's World Cup elimination is an embarrassment
images.caption: Klinsmann: Germany's World Cup elimination is an embarrassment

articles.headline: World Cup: Grades for every eliminated team as they exit the tournament
articles.description: When the World Cup ends, 47 teams will have been eliminated, and we're grading every one on how their run compared with expectations.

articles.headline: Marcus Rashford, Noni Madueke start for England vs. Congo DR at World Cup
articles.description: Thomas Tuchel has made three changes for England's round of 32 World Cup knockout match against Congo DR in Atlanta, with Marcus Rashford retaining his place on the left wing, while Noni Madueke, Djed Spence and Declan Rice all start.
